hero.name: Mohamed Ghelli

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Engineering the future through networks and code
about.content: I am a dedicated Network Engineer & Full Stack Developer with a passion for building secure, scalable, and high-performance digital solutions. My unique background in Telecommunications combined with modern web development allows me to bridge the gap between complex infrastructure and intuitive user experiences.
about.description_roles: Mastering the synergy between robust network architecture and modern application development.

items.name: ISCAE Connect
items.description: Absence management application for ISCAE. Allows students and teachers to track attendance, view absences and receive notifications.

items.name: Mawashi App
items.description: Mobile application built by a team of 3. Platform connecting livestock breeders and buyers in Mauritania, with listings management and real-time messaging.

items.name: Library Management System
items.description: Complete web application for library management with borrowing system, user management and book catalog. Responsive and intuitive interface.

items.name: Krilywte - Car Booking Platform
items.description: Car booking platform in Mauritania. Complete system with reservation management, payments and administration.

items.name: Ajir Challenge 2025 - Nuit de l'Info
items.description: Project developed during the 2025 Nuit de l'Informatique in collaboration with Mouhamed OUMAR. Interactive web application with real-time backend.

items.name: Library Management System (Java)
items.description: Desktop library management application developed in Java. Manage books, members and borrowings with a graphical interface.

items.name: ISCAE Annuaire
items.description: Mobile directory application for ISCAE built with .NET MAUI. Browse student and staff contacts with real-time data synchronization.

experience.title: PFE Intern - Full Stack Developer

responsibilities: Developing high-performance web and mobile interfaces
Collaborating within a dynamic technical team

experience.title: Network & Telecom Intern
experience.description: Internship in the network administration and telecommunications department.

education.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Networks & Telecom
education.description: Specialized training in computer networks, telecommunications and full stack web development.
highlights: Focus on network security and infrastructure

education.title: Baccalaureate C (Mathematics)
education.description: Obtained baccalaureate series C with honors, specializing in mathematics and physical sciences.
